signals.headline: Kevin Warsh's nomination as next Fed Chair confirmed amid surging inflation and rate hike speculation
signals.raw:
Kevin Warsh's nomination as next Fed Chair confirmed amid surging inflation and rate hike speculation.** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][3][4]

Kevin Warsh is Trump's nominee to succeed Jerome Powell as Federal Reserve Chair, with sources indicating likely Senate confirmation by mid-May 2026, positioning him to potentially oversee an interest rate hike as his first major decision amid oil price

US-Iran Ceasefire Talks Advance as Deadline Looms; No New Agreement Confirmed** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][2][6]
